name: com.apple.MCX(TimeServer)
title: Time Server
description: The payload that configures the time server.

payload.content: Settings for time zone and server. If multiple profiles with this payload are sent, the device's time server will be set to the value in the last payload installed. Removing the payload will not change the settings back to the prior settings.

payloadkeys.content: The NTP server to connect to. In macOS 10.13 and later, only one time server is supported.
The time zone path location string in `/usr/share/zoneinfo/`; for example, `America/Denver` or `Zulu`.
